phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Casa das Histórias Paula Rego
phrases.text_local: Como chego à Casa das Histórias Paula Rego?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH KAH-zuh DUHSH eesh-TAW-reeuhsh POW-luh REH-goo?
phrases.cultural_note: The museum sits in a restored villa with distinctive blue architectural details.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga a sinalização azul pela marginal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh AH see-nuh-lee-zuh-SOWN uh-ZOOW PEH-luh muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the blue signs along the promenade.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the blue signs along the promenade.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh AH see-nuh-lee-zuh-SOWN uh-ZOOW PEH-luh muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, siga a sinalização azul pela marginal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent beach umbrellas
phrases.text_local: Onde posso alugar guarda-sóis para a praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo uh-loo-GAHR GWAH-ruh-duh-SAWEESH PUH-ruh AH PREYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Beach umbrella rentals are typically found along the sandy stretches.

likely_response.local: Pode alugar nos quiosques à beira-mar.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih uh-loo-GAHR NOOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh AH BAY-ruh-MAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: You can rent them at the kiosks by the sea.

responses.english: You can rent them at the kiosks by the sea.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih uh-loo-GAHR NOOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh AH BAY-ruh-MAHR.
responses.local: Pode alugar nos quiosques à beira-mar.

phrases.text_local: Onde consigo alugar pranchas de surf por aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee con-SEE-goo ah-loo-GAR PRAN-shahs jee SERF POR ah-KEE
phrases.cultural_note: Surf equipment rentals are concentrated near the most consistent breaks.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, nas lojas junto ao areal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUHSH LOH-zhuhsh ZHOONNG-too OW uh-REEAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the shops next to the beach.

responses.english: Good morning, at the shops next to the beach.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUHSH LOH-zhuhsh ZHOONNG-too OW uh-REEAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, nas lojas junto ao areal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to book boat tours
phrases.text_local: Onde se reservam passeios de barco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-jee see reh-ZER-vahm pahs-SAY-oos jee BAR-koo
phrases.cultural_note: Boat tours in Cascais depart from the marina area.

likely_response.translation_en: At the marina, by the pier.

responses.english: At the marina, by the pier.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent beach umbrellas
phrases.text_local: Onde posso alugar um guarda-sol na praia?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee POH-soo a-loo-GAR oong-GWAHR-da-SOL nah PRAI-a
phrases.cultural_note: Umbrella rentals operate from seasonal kiosks directly on the shoreline.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, nos quiosques junto à areia.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh ZHOONNG-too AH uh-RAYUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the kiosks next to the sand.

responses.english: Good morning, at the kiosks next to the sand.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh ZHOONNG-too AH uh-RAYUH.
responses.local: Bom dia, nos quiosques junto à areia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to book boat tours
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os balcões para reservar passeios de barco?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-kown oosh bown-SOYNS PAH-rah reh-ser-VAHR pah-SOY-oos jee BAR-koo
phrases.cultural_note: Tour desks cluster near the marina for easy passenger boarding.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto ao cais principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW KEYESH preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the main pier.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the main pier.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW KEYESH preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, junto ao cais principal.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso alugar uma prancha de surf perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee POH-soo ah-loo-GAH-ROO-mah PRAHN-shah dee SOOR-fee PEHR-too dah-KEE

likely_response.local: Os quiosques de aluguer de pranchas de surf encontram-se junto ao areal. Dirija-se a um deles ou pergunte ao monitor de surf na praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: OOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh DIH uh-loo-GEHR DIH PRAHNNG-shuhsh DIH SOO-ruhf ayng-KOHNGT-ruhng-SIH ZHOONNG-too OW uh-REEAHL. dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH OONNG DEH-lihsh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW moo-nee-TOHR DIH SOO-ruhf NUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Surfboard rental kiosks are located near the beach. Go to one of them or ask the surf instructor on the beach.

responses.english: Surfboard rental kiosks are located near the beach. Go to one of them or ask the surf instructor on the beach.
responses.phonetic: OOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh DIH uh-loo-GEHR DIH PRAHNNG-shuhsh DIH SOO-ruhf ayng-KOHNGT-ruhng-SIH ZHOONNG-too OW uh-REEAHL. dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH OONNG DEH-lihsh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW moo-nee-TOHR DIH SOO-ruhf NUH PREYEUH.
responses.local: Os quiosques de aluguer de pranchas de surf encontram-se junto ao areal. Dirija-se a um deles ou pergunte ao monitor de surf na praia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Casa das Histórias Paula Rego
phrases.text_local: Como chego à Casa das Histórias Paula Rego?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH KAH-zuh DUHSH eesh-TAW-reeuhsh POW-luh REH-goo?
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is a short walk east along the waterfront.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Casa das Histórias Paula Rego.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH KAH-zuh DUHSH eesh-TAW-reeuhsh POW-luh REH-goo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Casa das Histórias Paula Rego.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Casa das Histórias Paula Rego.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH KAH-zuh DUHSH eesh-TAW-reeuhsh POW-luh REH-goo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Casa das Histórias Paula Rego.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Praia da Mareta is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente a Praia da Mareta?
phrases.cultural_note: This secluded cove is a short walk past the historic lighthouse.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto ao Farol de Santa Marta.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW fuh-RAWL DIH SAHNNG-tuh MAH-ruh-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the Santa Marta Lighthouse.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the Santa Marta Lighthouse.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW fuh-RAWL DIH SAHNNG-tuh MAH-ruh-tuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, junto ao Farol de Santa Marta.

phrases.cultural_note: Surfboard rentals are available at shops near the surf-friendly beaches.

likely_response.translation_en: In the shops by the beach.

responses.english: In the shops by the beach.
